titleStmt.title: SII 26.554: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 554. (A.R. No. 524 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Aḻagaṉ perumāḷ Kulaśēkharadēva: Ś. 1395 and year 2+42, Kumbha Māśi 15, ba. 7, Wednesday, Anusham = 1474 A.D., February, 9.

summary.p: This inscription is engraved in Tamil and Grantha characters.

It refers to the building from the central shrine to gōpura of the temple of Viśvanātha in Dakshiṇa-kāśi (Teṉkāśi) on the northern bank of Chitranadī in Teṉṉārī-nāḍu and states that a certain Tiruvāli Śrīraṅgarājān Brahmādarāyan of Kāśyapa-gōtra and Āśvalāyana-sūtra, built a shrine, in the pañcha-prākāra for the god Polinduniṉṟapirāṉ and arranged for the worship of the god. It further states that the ruler desired to have the images of the Polinduiṉṟa-piḷḷai, the goddess, and the attendant deities consecrated and to provide for their worship and offerings, which was done through the above mentioned Brāhmārāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu saṇḍāryya metat sattam samasta suramaulibhiḥ śāsanam vidhvanādhasya sambho rjjayati śvatam Ādicaṇḍeśvarājñeyam śakābdam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟañciṉ meṟ collāniṉṟa naṅkumāṟaṉ Aḻakaṉ perumāḷ kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etir nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu kumabharavi patiṉañcāntiyatiyum Aparapakṣattu saptamiyum budhavāra- mum peṟṟa Aṉuṣattu nāḷ teṉṉārināṭṭu citranati Uttaratirattu dakṣaṇa kāśiyil nam Ālaiyam garbhagrahan tuṭaṅki gopurān=tamāka Uḷḷa paṇikaḷuñ ceyvittu niṉṟa kāśyapagotrattu Āślāyana sūtrattu tiruvāli śrīraṅgarājan brahmātarāyan pañcaprākā
yattile polintu niṉṟa pirāṉaiyum pradiṣṭhittu Arccaṉaikku muṉṉāḷ nām kaṟpittu naṭantu potukacceyte mulālayattile polintuniṉṟa piḷḷaiyum devimāraiyum parivāravoṅkaḷaiyum pradiṣṭhittu Arccanaic celavukku veṇṭu matu kaṟpittuk kuṭukkaveṇumeṉṟu nam Ālaiyattil kāṇiyāḷarāka Aṉaittuk kottiluḷḷa vātaṉaiyuṅkūṭṭi nam kumāraṉ kulacekaradevaṉ nammuṭaṉ collukaiyil nāmum nam gauri Uṭaṉiruntu nāḷ toṟum Arccanai Aṟai yil kuṭukkumpaṭi nāḷatu mutalukku kaṟpitta nāḷ Oṉṟukku Arici patiṉāḻiyum kaṟipalam Eṭṭum Uppu Uḻakkumiḷaku Āḻākkum carkkarai palam Oṉṟum paḻa nālum canta
puṭavai muṉṟukku mācimātam nam U�savāntattilai kuṭukkak kaṟpitta paṇam patiṉañcumāka Immaricāti kaṟpittavakaippaṭiye tiruvāli śrīraṅgarāyan brahmā rāyaṉ vāṅki Arccanaiyum kuṟaivaṟa naṭattippotumpaṭiyum Arccanaikku nāṅkaṟpittu naṭakkiṟapaṭiyile nāḷ Oṉṟukku nāṉāḻi Ariciccoṟu Ivaṉ peṟṟup potum paṭiyum kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Immaricātiyile Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku Ivvolai piṭipāṭāka candrātityavat cellak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi śan=tati praveśame nam pyañcana Aṟaiyile kaṟpitta vakaippaṭi Uḷḷa dravyaṅ kaḷum vāṅki Arccanaiyum kuṟaivaṟa naṭatti nāḷ toṟum Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.554 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
